book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon IX.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Let no cleric be permitted to keep a “public house.”

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: For if it be not permitted to enter a tavern, much more is it forbidden to serve others in it and to carry on a trade which is unlawful for him.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: But if he shall have done any such thing, either let him desist or be deposed.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: If clerics are forbidden to enter public houses, much more are they forbidden to keep them.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Let them either give them up or be deposed.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Compare with this canon liv. of the Apostolic Canons; xxiv. of Laodicea; and xliij. of the Synod of Carthage.
